jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at LIC
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, LIC in Chennai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About LIC:
LIC is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LIC!
